version_description: Accurate Chords of his live version.

performance.name: Unspecified but found link that may match

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
After looking up several Ed Sheeran songs on ultimate guitar and afterwards having to adjust the chords
through live vids of him playing the song,to be able to play a "perfect" cover,
I finally release my first own tab.


Please enjoy the original accurate Chords from the live version:

no capo, standard tuning


[tab]    [ch]A/E[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
e|---0-----------0-----------0-----------0-----|
B|---5-----------0-----------0-----------0-----|
G|---7-----------0-----------0-----------0-----|
D|---6----------11-----------9-----------7-----|
A|---7----------11-----------9-----------7-----|
E|---------------9-----------7-----------5-----|[/tab]

Depending on the section of the song, he's strumming the open strings more/less.



[Intro] 

[ch]A/E[/ch] | [ch]C#[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch]
